category_sources: Official Jetty repository describes Eclipse Jetty as a web container and clients project supporting HTTP, WebSocket, and servlets.
source_facts.description says Jetty is a Java servlet engine and webserver.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jetty; official documentation and repository use Eclipse Jetty/Jetty.
docs_sources: Official Jetty 12.1 operations guide matches the Homebrew package major line.
Official Jetty website has a dedicated documentation index.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Jetty documentation and repository identify jetty/jetty.project as the source project.
tags_sources: Official Jetty repository topics and description cover HTTP, WebSocket, servlet, and Jakarta EE support.
source_facts.description identifies servlet engine and webserver functionality.
